name: @appstrate/github-git-mcp
description: Full git working-tree MCP server backed by the `git` CLI baked into the bun runner image. Tools cover the clone → edit → commit → push → open-PR loop against any GitHub repo the user has access to, using the OAuth2 GITHUB_TOKEN minted by the companion @appstrate/github-git integration. Files land on the per-run shared workspace at /workspace — the agent edits them via the platform runtime tools (Bash/Read/Edit) and uses this server only for the git/GitHub plumbing. Pairs with @appstrate/github-clone when all you need is a read-only tarball; this one is for read/write flows that culminate in a pull request.
author: Appstrate

tools.name: clone
tools.description: Clone a GitHub repository into the per-run shared workspace. Configures the remote with the OAuth token via `http.extraheader` so subsequent push/fetch calls authenticate without leaking the token into .git/config. Returns the absolute clone path.

tools.name: checkout_branch
tools.description: Switch to a branch in a cloned repo, creating it (optionally off `base`) when `create=true`.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Return `git status --short` for a cloned repo. Use before commit to verify what will land.

tools.name: diff
tools.description: Return `git diff` (or `git diff --staged` when `staged=true`) for a cloned repo. Truncated at 200KB to avoid context bloat.

tools.name: commit
tools.description: Stage paths (`paths` array, defaults to all changes) and create a commit with the given message. Configures user.name/user.email on the local repo from the GitHub identity (login + noreply email) when unset.

tools.name: push
tools.description: Push the current branch to origin. Sets the upstream on first push. Returns the remote ref.

tools.name: open_pr
tools.description: Open a pull request via the GitHub REST API. `head` is the branch with the changes (your fork or this repo's branch); `base` defaults to the repository's default branch. Returns the PR number + url.
